payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded, so it should not be presented as current.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context identifies Sam from Goldman as the relevant entity, and mem_new is the current memory while mem_old is superseded.

mem_old was excluded from recall results because it is marked as superseded.

details: Explained filtering of mem_old due to supersession.
